title: Grand Theft Auto VI
short_description: The highly anticipated next instalment in the Grand Theft Auto series.
description: Grand Theft Auto VI is the upcoming entry in Rockstar Games' flagship open-world franchise. Set in the fictional state of Leonida, home to the neon-soaked Vice City, the game follows the story of Lucia and her partner in a sprawling criminal underworld. First revealed in December 2023, GTA VI represents the next generation of open-world gaming and is among the most anticipated titles in video game history.
